name: Revealing Light
description: You create bright light that reveals hidden enemies and illusions. Creates a 20-foot radius of bright light and 20 feet of dim light beyond that. Hidden or invisible creatures in the area have disadvantage on Stealth checks.
effect: Emits bright light in a 20-foot radius, dim light for 20 feet beyond. Hidden or invisible creatures in the area have disadvantage on Stealth checks.
notes: Illuminates a 20-foot radius for 1 hour; useful in dark dungeons
Penalizes Stealth for hidden creatures — effectively a detection tool
